idea-plugin.name: Legend of Zelda Progress Bar
idea-plugin.description: Replaces the IntelliJ progress bar with Legend of Zelda characters and animated items.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 2.1.1

  • 🐛 Fixed What's New formatting and added missing closing tags in the change notes

2.1.0

  • ✨ 1 new item added: Heart Container
  • 🎨 Fixed missing animations for removed items
  • 🐛 Bug fixes: improved resource scanning and icon-frame filtering
  • ⚙️ Build: aligned plugin version across Gradle properties and build script

2.0.0

  • ✨ 3 new characters added: Skull Kid, Mask Vendor, and Sheik
  • 🎨 Enhanced dark/light theme compatibility
  • 🧹 Code cleanup and performance improvements
